mission.title: argo-events: Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as EventSource and Sensor
mission.description: Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as EventSource and Sensor. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-events deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-events version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
helm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-events installation.

steps.title: Review argo-events configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events
```
We use the Argo CLI to lint our workflows in our development process and the CI/CD pipeline. It catches errors up front and can be a useful static debugging tool. It does not find any files to lint when given a path to an EventSource or Sensor.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as…
steps.description:
## Feat
Implements a lint command for the Argo Events CLI to validate EventSource and Sensor YAML files before deployment, addressing the feature request in #3260.

Currently, users have no way to validate their EventSource and Sensor manifests until they deploy them to a cluster. This PR adds a lint command that performs the same validation checks the controllers use at runtime, enabling early error detection in development and CI/CD pipelines.

## Motivation

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Argo lint should work for argo-event resources such as…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Feat
Implements a lint command for the Argo Events CLI to validate EventSource and Sensor YAML files before deployment, addressing the feature request in #3260.

Currently, users have no way to validate their EventSource and Sensor manifests until they deploy them to a cluster.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible.
